stemHtml:
The aircraft is climbing on track of 087°T, from an initial altitude of 2000 ft to FL80. The QNH is 1013 hPa and the CAS during climb is 90 kt. Calculate the groundspeed during climb using a flight computer and the following wind and OAT data.

FL240: 270°/65 kt −35°C
FL180: 265°/50 kt −25°C
FL120: 260°/40 kt −15°C
FL80: 240°/30 kt −10°C
FL40: 220°/20 kt +00°C
SFC: Light and Variable +10°C
